title: Asset 87
description: This mod adds the Spinosaurus from jp3
body:
**Discription**
Asset 87 is a terrifying dinosaur from the Jurassic Park franchise. Asset 87 targets the player. It spawns at randome searching for the player until it spots you. When spotted he will attack the player. When the player is hit by Asset 87 he will get a bleeding effect that slowly kills the player, but also makes it that Asset 87 can find the player with smell. 

There is also the chance you will hear a phone ringing. You are not crazy it is him.


**Disclaimers**
!Know that: If you have many world gen mods Asset 87 might not spawn!

Disclaimer this mod is not a dweller reskin!

This mod requires geckolib
